summary: Multi-run effort to bring the XIIGen MVP's 48 flows from CRUD-default admin consoles to purpose-built UI/UX with verified PNG evidence. Work spans 7 canonical grammars (G1-G7) + 1 no-UI classification. Session runs RUN-49 through RUN-97. RUN-87 resets on a refreshed design-skills stack: root /.impeccable.md establishes XIIGen's aesthetic direction + token vocabulary + 5 design principles; SK-542 protocol bumped to v1.1.0 with Step 0 (/.impeccable.md read), Step 2c pre-JSX checkpoint, Step 6 six mandate checks; flow-prep-library (83 files) + ext-skills-flat (38 files) installed under .claude/skills/. RUN-89..97 = nine craft commits, each addressing a specific finding from Luba's critique doc bundle (UIUX-PROMAX / IMPECCABLE / INTERFACE-DESIGN / DESIGN-FOR-AI), applying Step 2c with why-each-choice cited against /.impeccable.md and six mandate checks post-edit.

flowStatus.note: status values: REBUILT_VERIFIED = purpose-built component + post-fix PNG captured; PAGE_REWRITTEN_STYLED = CRUD replaced with screen + Tailwind styled; DOCS_ONLY = examination record + PNG inventory but no code rewrite; STYLED_PARTIAL = some role branches rewritten, others still CRUD; NO_XIIGEN_UI = external vendor adapter, no screen to design; SPEC_GAP = F1 STEP-1-INVARIANTS misaligned with slug
